_comment: Self-contained labelled set for `botfam meta-review eval` (botfam#306). Each case carries its own corpus (tree file list + Lineage text) so the eval runs offline and reproducibly. Cases are modelled on the proposal-process-risk-labels worked example (the #298 triage, re-expressed as labels) and the meta-review skill's examples. `expected` is the per-artifact risk label set a human confirmed; the batch-tier labels (risk/fragmentation, source/agent-burst) are intentionally absent — they are out of this tier's scope.

cases.name: phase-inversion-missing-schema
cases.title: Re-sequence the simulator around the trace schema
cases.body: Build the query-based checker on top of `internal/trace/schema.go`, reading events the producer emits. Wire it into `internal/cli/root.go`.

cases.name: superseded-ccrep
cases.title: Add a CCREP quality ratchet gate
cases.body: Re-introduce the consensus ratchet from [ccrep](lineage-botfam-ccrep.md) so merges require N approvals tracked in the ledger.
cases.lineage: | CCREP (quality ratchet) | [lineage-botfam-ccrep](lineage-botfam-ccrep.md) — superseded; consensus is now Gitea branch protection |

cases.name: hollow-validation-test-restates-impl
cases.title: Add coverage for the resolver default
cases.body: Adds a test pinning the resolver's default precedence.

cases.name: speculative-ranker-before-data
cases.title: Train a fragmentation ranker
cases.body: Build a learned ranker for risk/fragmentation. We have no labelled data yet, so we assume that cosine similarity over embeddings approximates human judgement.

cases.name: clean-existing-files
cases.title: Tidy the CLI root wiring
cases.body: Small refactor of `internal/cli/rootcmd.go`; no new dependencies.

cases.name: clean-references-live-decision
cases.title: Extend the architecture MOC
cases.body: Add a pattern page under the [architecture](Architecture.md) language; it governs the current system.
cases.lineage: | Architecture | live page; governs the current system |
